picture.translate: картина, изображение, картинка, рисунок, изобразить, представлять себе
mnemonic:
picture ['pɪktʃə]
depict [dɪ'pɪkt] - изображать
***
ИЗОБРАЗИЛ на КАРТИНЕ лисичку и спички. (это)
picture
ИЗОБРАЗИЛ тупик|чей. (это) picture
Картина, изображение, портрет.

examples.eng: Get the picture?
She is just a picture.
Mary pictures her mother.
You have pictured her very vividly.
The picture hung askew.
The gardens are a picture.
The book has a lot of pictures.
examples.ru: В этой книге очень много картинок.

examples.eng: Tom, picturing the scene, smiled.
examples.ru: Том улыбнулся, представив себе эту картину.

examples.eng: Can you picture him as a teacher?
He cradled the picture.
What is it? It's a picture.
Draw a picture of your house.
I hung the picture on the wall.
The child coloured in the picture.
Write your name under your picture.
Center the picture on the wall.
His pictures hang in the Louvre.
My nephew colored a picture for me.
Who played in that picture?
Nail the picture to the wall.
a stylised picture of the sun
a painterly picture of the sea
The picture was cropped badly.
He is a picture of his mother.
examples.ru: Он очень похож на свою мать.

examples.eng: She was the picture of despair.
Tnsert a picture into the text.
The frame sets off the picture.
You know I am no picture sharp.
examples.ru: Видите ли, я совсем не разбираюсь в живописи.

examples.eng: It makes the picture more fuzzy.
examples.ru: От этого изображение становится более размытым.

examples.eng: a picture imprinted in my memory
